english: to enter / go to school or work
notes: For um- verbs, the infinitive and completed forms are identical.

examples.tagalog: Kailangan mong pumasok sa paaralan bukas.
examples.english: You need to go to school tomorrow.

examples.tagalog: Pumasok ka nang tahimik bago magsimula ang klase.

examples.english: She went to work without notice.

examples.tagalog: Pumasok ang mga estudyante nang mapayapa.
Pumapasok siya sa trabaho tuwing Lunes hanggang Biyernes.
examples.english: He goes to work every Monday to Friday.

examples.tagalog: Pumapasok ang mga mag-aaral nang alas-siyete ng umaga.
examples.english: The students go to school at seven in the morning.

examples.tagalog: Papasok siya sa bagong trabaho bukas.
examples.english: She will go to her new job tomorrow.

examples.tagalog: Papasok ba kayo bukas kahit holiday?
examples.english: Will you go to work tomorrow even on a holiday?
